meta.title: Run Distilled DeepSeek v3 Reasoning Models on Any Laptop with LMStudio
meta.description:
➡️ More Trelis Resources: https://trelis.com
➡️ Trelis Newsletter: https://trelis.substack.com

SOFTWARE LINKS:
➡️ LMStudio (Windows or Mac M1/2/3/4): https://lmstudio.ai/download
➡️ llamafile (for Mac w/ Intel Chip): https://github.com/Mozilla-Ocho/llamafile

Recommended Models for LMStudio:
➡️ Windows: lmstudio-community/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-1.5B-GGUF
➡️ Mac with 8 GB RAM: lmstudio-community/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-7B-GGUF OR lmstudio-community/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B-GGUF
➡️ Mac w/ 16 GB RAM: lmstudio-community/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-14B-GGUF OR lmstudio-community/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-8B-GGUF
➡️ Mac w/ 32-128 GB RAM: lmstudio-community/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Qwen-32B-GGUF OR lmstudio-community/DeepSeek-R1-Distill-Llama-70B-GGUF

TIMESTAMPS:
00:11 Downloading and Installing LM Studio
00:41 Navigating LM Studio Interface
01:01 Choosing and Running Models (DeepSeek v3 Reasoning Models via Qwen and Llama Distills)
02:49 Testing Model Performance
05:19 Using Larger Models
09:32 Document Interaction and Limitations
12:53 Mistral Small (not reasoning)
13:45 Alternative Methods for Older Macs/PCs - llamafile
15:51 Conclusion and Final Tips
